steps: Go to https://trello.com/power-ups/admin and log in with your Atlassian/Trello account
Click 'New' to create a new Power-Up (required to obtain an API key)
Fill in the Power-Up name, workspace, iframe URL (can be a placeholder), and contact email
After creating the Power-Up, click on it and navigate to the 'API Key' tab
Click 'Generate a new API Key' — your API key is now displayed
To generate a user Token, click the 'Token' link on the same page and authorize access

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Trello API key from the Power-Ups admin panel. Passed as a query parameter.

notes: The API key itself is not secret and can be publicly visible
A user Token is also required for most API operations — generate it from the API Key page
Tokens grant access to a user's full Trello account — store them securely
Trello API is free with no usage fees for standard use
Trello uses both API key + token as query parameters: ?key=API_KEY&token=TOKEN

test_endpoint.description: Get the authenticated member's profile — replace {key} and {token} with your credentials
